description:
The quiz assesses knowledge of modern CSS concepts through multiple‑choice questions, gauging both practical skill and confidence for résumé inclusion. It is positioned at an intermediate difficulty, presented in an engaging, conversational tone that encourages self‑assessment.
Topics: Modern CSS features, Responsive design, CSS layout techniques, Browser compatibility, CSS preprocessors
Audience: Front‑end developers and web designers looking to validate and showcase their CSS proficiency, especially those preparing their professional portfolios.
